column2: Voodoo is the leading hyper-casual mobile publisher with 6B+ downloads. VP Publishing Alex Shea leads partnership discussions.
SayGames is a top 5 hyper-casual publisher with 4B+ downloads. CEO Yegor Vaikhanski drives strategic partnerships.
Supersonic is IronSource's publishing division (top 3). GM Niv Yemini oversees publishing partnerships.
Rollic is Zynga's hyper-casual studio with 1B+ downloads. Burak Vardal leads publishing.
Lion Studios is AppLovin's publishing division with 3B+ downloads. Partnership team handles developer relations.
